div.p: buffer_meta: |md ### Buffer Context - Base Address: 0x7ffee120 - Alignment: 8-Byte (QWORD) - State: Unordered / High Entropy - Entropy H(x): 3.87 bits | { shape: text style.font-size: 12 } }
step1_sorting: { class: logic_step label: "Step 1: In-Place Quicksort (O(N log N))" style.fill: "#FFF3E0"

footer_note: |md Implementation Note: Uses the Median as the denominator for Coefficient of Variation (CV) to increase robustness against interrupt-driven timing spikes (outliers). | { near: threshold_legend style.font-size: 11 }

text.tspan: // For odd N=15, median is at N/2
// For odd N=15, median is at N/2
